scripts.test: npm run test:fast && npm run test:inference:e2e && npm run test:worker:protocol && npm run test:server
scripts.test:fast: npm run lint && npm run test:manifest && npm run test:ui && npm run test:viewer && npm run test:processing && npm run test:batch:webapp && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:controllers && npm run test:ui:modules
scripts.test:controllers: node --no-warnings scripts/test_file_io_controller.mjs && node --no-warnings scripts/test_dicom_controller.mjs && node --no-warnings scripts/test_inference_executor.mjs
